coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 2-group, 18-node closure.
validation: Authored and Selection-enabled Blender/VM cases have exact topology and local bounds within 0.0001 units. The supplied Selection socket does not change Blender's evaluated result, so the library entry intentionally exposes no misleading control.

material.contract: Blender unassigned neutral surface: linear 0.8 base color, metalness 0, roughness 0.5
material.residual: Blender clips the neutral object essentially pure white; Three.js retains a small dark edge/backface rim.
